message:
chore: sync beads issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -906,7 +906,7 @@
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.3","title":"TEST: fcp.1password Unit/Integration Tests (mock-only)","description":"## Goal
Mock-only unit/integration tests for this connector.

## Required coverage
- schema validation (inputs + outputs)
- error taxonomy mapping (retry semantics)
- pagination and bounds
- rate limit behavior
- redaction (no token/secret/PII leakage)
- idempotency + receipts for Dangerous operations

## Logging
All tests emit structured JSON logs per `flywheel_connectors-1n78.35`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic tests; no live external calls.
- Includes adversarial cases (timeouts, malformed responses, partial failures).
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-15T12:12:07.465903266Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-03-05T19:50:11.054242Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T19:50:11.054229Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["connectors","fcp2","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1n78.35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-h32","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":795,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.3","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"SunnyMoose: Built 1Password connector with 133 tests (97 unit + 36 integration). All passing. Covers vaults.list, items.list/get/create/delete, full lifecycle, error handling, wiremock integration.","created_at":"2026-03-05T19:50:04Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.4","title":"E2E: fcp.1password Connector Compliance Run","description":"## Goal
Run the shared connector compliance runner and capture an evidence bundle.

## Must validate
- handshake + introspection correctness
- default deny (no CapabilityToken → deny + DecisionReceipt)
- NetworkConstraints enforcement
- receipts/audit for Dangerous operations
- structured logs

## Acceptance Criteria
- E2E run is deterministic and produces a stable artifact bundle.

Blocked by provisioning bead.","created_at":"2026-03-07T20:22:01Z"},{"id":1027,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8egw.4","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"E2E compliance tests fixed and passing (3/3): default_deny, allow_valid_token, manifest_network_guard.","created_at":"2026-03-07T21:10:23Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","title":"[FCP3/P6.5] Add CLI acceptance coverage for offline, node local, and mesh backed truth scenarios","description":"Background: the CLI credibility depends on being truthful across different knowledge modes: offline artifact inspection, node local live control, and mesh backed live control. Those distinctions need explicit automated coverage with user visible artifacts.

Scope: add acceptance coverage and scriptable CLI scenarios for offline, host local, and mesh backed flows, verifying both behavior and the provenance or availability labels shown to the user. Require detailed command transcripts, structured logs, and artifact bundles so failures can be inspected at both the operator surface and the underlying evidence layer.

Acceptance: fwc truthfulness is tested across the full transition spectrum with comprehensive end to end scripts and detailed logs, including negative cases where the system must refuse to overclaim.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-27T18:32:08.755761Z","created_by":"CobaltHarbor","updated_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:20.692724Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acceptance","fcp3","fcp3-refoundation","logging","mesh-first","phase-6","tests","transcripts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-24llg.6.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:34:20.692095Z","created_by":"Codex","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-kpj16","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-27T18:32:52.499836Z","created_by":"CobaltHarbor","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-o8umn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-27T18:32:53.212918Z","created_by":"CobaltHarbor","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","title":"[FCP3/P6.5] Freeze the CLI truth scenario matrix across offline, local, mesh, and degraded modes","description":"Background: CLI truthfulness needs a stable scenario matrix before artifact capture starts. Otherwise different agents will test overlapping fragments and still miss entire knowledge modes.

Scope: define the acceptance matrix for offline artifact inspection, node-local control, mesh-backed truth, degraded operation, and truthful refusal cases. Pin the representative commands, expected provenance states, and required artifacts for each scenario.

Acceptance: later acceptance beads can execute against one shared matrix instead of inventing ad hoc scenario lists, and the matrix is detailed enough to support both docs and proof-bundle work.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:54:59.117087Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","updated_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:15.760570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acceptance","fcp3","fcp3-refoundation","phase-6","tests","transcripts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:54:59.117087Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2422,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Group acceptance note: the scenario matrix and captures here should explicitly cover offline, node-local, mesh-backed, degraded, and refusal paths. For each scenario preserve command transcript, structured logs, artifact locations, and minimal rerun commands; do not rely on prose-only descriptions if a later reviewer needs to reconstruct what the CLI actually proved.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:15Z"}]}
+{"id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","title":"[FCP3/P6.5] Freeze the CLI truth scenario matrix across offline, local, mesh, and degraded modes","description":"Background: CLI truthfulness needs a stable scenario matrix before artifact capture starts. Otherwise different agents will test overlapping fragments and still miss entire knowledge modes.

Scope: define the acceptance matrix for offline artifact inspection, node-local control, mesh-backed truth, degraded operation, and truthful refusal cases. Pin the representative commands, expected provenance states, and required artifacts for each scenario.

Acceptance: later acceptance beads can execute against one shared matrix instead of inventing ad hoc scenario lists, and the matrix is detailed enough to support both docs and proof-bundle work.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:54:59.117087Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","updated_at":"2026-04-05T23:49:28.722663Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acceptance","fcp3","fcp3-refoundation","phase-6","tests","transcripts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:54:59.117087Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2422,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Group acceptance note: the scenario matrix and captures here should explicitly cover offline, node-local, mesh-backed, degraded, and refusal paths. For each scenario preserve command transcript, structured logs, artifact locations, and minimal rerun commands; do not rely on prose-only descriptions if a later reviewer needs to reconstruct what the CLI actually proved.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:15Z"},{"id":2469,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","author":"PlumEagle","text":"Claim attempt via br update remains blocked by parent bead flywheel_connectors-8jc8f, so I am proceeding with a bounded scenario-matrix slice inside the existing truthfulness surfaces. Scope: extend the frozen operator-truth matrix in crates/fwc/testdata/operator_truth/fixture_matrix.json and matching cual_integration coverage so the shared acceptance surface explicitly covers the fifth required class, a truthful refusal/denial case, alongside offline, node-local, mesh-backed, and degraded/fallback cases. I am also checking whether the matrix can cheaply freeze minimal artifact/rerun metadata without widening into runtime implementation work.","created_at":"2026-04-05T23:49:28Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.2","title":"[FCP3/P6.5] Capture offline and node-local CLI truth scenarios with reproducible artifacts","description":"Background: offline and node-local flows are the easiest places for truth semantics to drift because they often look similar to mesh-backed flows from the CLI surface.

Scope: implement and capture the offline and node-local portions of the CLI acceptance matrix. Produce transcripts, snapshots, and structured logs that show exactly what the CLI knows, what it does not know, and how provenance is presented when the answer is not mesh-backed.

Acceptance: offline and node-local truth scenarios are reproducible, artifact-backed, and explicit enough that future regressions in provenance labeling are obvious.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:54:59.724139Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","updated_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:16.175115Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acceptance","fcp3","fcp3-refoundation","logging","phase-6","tests","transcripts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:54:59.724139Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:56:49.297418Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-hoogu.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:56:49.825969Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2423,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.2","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Group acceptance note: the scenario matrix and captures here should explicitly cover offline, node-local, mesh-backed, degraded, and refusal paths. For each scenario preserve command transcript, structured logs, artifact locations, and minimal rerun commands; do not rely on prose-only descriptions if a later reviewer needs to reconstruct what the CLI actually proved.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:16Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.3","title":"[FCP3/P6.5] Capture mesh-backed, degraded, and refusal CLI truth scenarios","description":"Background: mesh-backed and degraded scenarios are where the new architecture either proves itself or overclaims. They need their own artifact pack rather than being treated as an extension of local-only testing.

Scope: implement and capture the mesh-backed, degraded, and truthful-refusal portions of the CLI acceptance matrix. Show not just successful mesh-backed answers but also degraded visibility, partial evidence, and cases where the system must explicitly refuse to overclaim.

Acceptance: mesh-backed truth semantics are exercised under both healthy and unhealthy conditions, and the resulting artifacts are strong enough for later cutover proof and documentation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:55:00.330586Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","updated_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:16.584926Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acceptance","fcp3","fcp3-refoundation","logging","mesh-first","phase-6","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:55:00.330586Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:56:50.466302Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-kpj16.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:56:51.041172Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-o8umn.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T17:56:51.643596Z","created_by":"SunnyOak","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2424,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-8jc8f.3","author":"SunnyOak","text":"Group acceptance note: the scenario matrix and captures here should explicitly cover offline, node-local, mesh-backed, degraded, and refusal paths. For each scenario preserve command transcript, structured logs, artifact locations, and minimal rerun commands; do not rely on prose-only descriptions if a later reviewer needs to reconstruct what the CLI actually proved.","created_at":"2026-04-03T20:12:16Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-8oe","title":"fcp.hubspot: Email tracking and sequences","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T15:15:53.625788349Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T17:31:33.752203399Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T17:31:33.752203399Z","close_reason":"CONSOLIDATED: All HubSpot sub-features merged into comprehensive parent connector bead flywheel_connectors-hy8v (fcp.hubspot: HubSpot CRM & Marketing Platform Connector)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
